contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Takes 3 years to fruit — grow for the fragrant leaves and long-term reward.

notes: Tropical rainforest understorey plant — prefers shade and high humidity. One of very few culinary herbs that thrives on a north-facing windowsill in a warm room. Takes 3 years to flower and fruit. Grow for the leaves and fragrance.
